creator: tg@gmplib.org
text:
A vanilla FreeBSD 8.1 system cannot kldload kqemu.ko.

I've tried both /emulators/kqemu-kmod and /emulators/kqemu-kmod-devel.

The kernel is *not* newer than kqemu.ko.

How-To-Repeat: king# kldload /boot/modules/kqemu.ko
kldload: can't load /boot/modules/kqemu.ko: Exec format error

king# file /boot/modules/kqemu.ko
/boot/modules/kqemu.ko: ELF 64-bit LSB relocatable, x86-64, version 1 (FreeBSD), not stripped
